body.text: I absolutely love this feature, great job by the team!
This update is terrible and full of bugs.
The workshop starts at 10 AM and ends at 1 PM.
The new release is okay, nothing special so far.

texts: Amazing speaker session today, really inspiring.
Customer support was slow and unhelpful.
The meeting room has changed to Hall B.
I am impressed with the speed improvements.
This is the worst UI update I have seen.
